prompt:
Why the Netherlands Is the Opposite of the United States — compare how Dutch and American cities are built and how people live.

Contrast Amsterdam canal houses, cycling culture, NS trains, Randstad density, and polders with American suburbs, highways, SUVs, and strip-mall sprawl. Show Amsterdam canals, Rotterdam skyline, wind turbines, tulip fields, and Dutch bike infrastructure alongside American highways, Detroit suburbs, and Texas sprawl.

Documentary tone. English narration and voiceover only.
